---
title: "Eit-Paper"
author: "Helena Gartmeier"
format: html
---

# Introduction {#sec-intro}

This is a paper draft for an evaluation framework for innovations of public transport (PT) pricing.

See the paper structure in @fig-mindmap.

[![Mindmap](images/paper_mindmap.png){#fig-mindmap}](https://excalidraw.com/#json=BNBLni1uOHNEkrmcGED26,4MiqeNDnRP_MT2tiVtQ7SQ)


# Methods {#sec-methods}

# Results {#sec-results}

# Discussion {#sec-discussion}

# References
